description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode was traveling northeast in the right lane on Harrison Street near 12th Street in
 San Francisco. At that time, it encountered a passenger car (Vehicle 2), facing the same direction of travel and reversing to parallel park 
adjacent to the curb along northeast-bound Harrison Street. The Zoox vehicle gradually slowed to a stop while the Vehicle 2 driver 
continued reversing, making contact with the right front fender of the Zoox vehicle. The Vehicle 2 driver then left the scene without 
stopping to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. The police were notified.
Print
Clear Form
